zh.Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭素可安莫林
zh.Angmering, Sussex, , England: 英國英格蘭素可安莫林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Palmer於1423年出生在英國英格蘭素可安莫林時，他的父親Sir John Palmer I26歲，母親Lady Joan Julian23歲。他於1454年與Isabell Elizabeth Bilton在英國英格蘭素可安莫林結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1481年在英國素可享年58歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Palmer于1423年出生在英国英格兰素可安莫林时，他的父亲Sir John Palmer I26岁，母亲Lady Joan Julian23岁。他于1454年与Isabell Elizabeth Bilton在英国英格兰素可安莫林结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1481年在英国素可享年58岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Palmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English palmer(e) ‘palmer, pilgrim to the Holy Land’ (Anglo-Norman French palmer, Old French pa(l)mer, paum(i)er), so called from the palm branch carried by such pilgrims. The term was also used to denote an itinerant monk who traveled from shrine to shrine under a vow of poverty. This surname is also common in Ireland, where it has been recorded from the 13th century onward.
Irish: when not of English origin (see 1 above), a surname adopted for Gaelic Ó Maolfhoghmhair (see Milford ), the name of an ecclesiastical family.
Swedish (mainly Palmér): ornamental name formed with palm ‘palm tree’ + the suffix -ér (a derivative of Latin -erius) or -er (from German).

variants.name: Milford
meanings: English (mainly Devon): habitational name from any of the many places called Milford, deriving from Old English myln ‘mill’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish (Antrim and Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolfhoghmhair ‘descendant of Maolgfhoghmhair’, a personal name meaning ‘chief of harvest’. The Irish name was first Anglicized as Mullover, which was later assimilated to Milford. See also Palmer .

variants.name: Palmiere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Dante, Enrico, Nicola, Salvatore, Vittorio.

variants.name: Palmore
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Palmer   or an Americanized form of South German   Balmer  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Palmer was born in 1423, in Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Palmer I, was 26 and his mother, Lady Joan Julian, was 23. He married Isabell Elizabeth Bilton in 1454, in Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1481, in Sussex, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Palmer est né en 1423, à Angmering, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Palmer I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Julian, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabell Elizabeth Bilton en 1454, à Angmering, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1481, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Palmer 1423 in Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Palmer I 26 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Julian 23. Er hat 1454 in Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Isabell Elizabeth Bilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1481 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Sussex, England und wurde in Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Palmer è nato il nel 1423 nel Angmering, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Palmer I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Julian, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabell Elizabeth Bilton nel 1454, nel Angmering, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1481, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Somerset, England.

ja.Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingd: イギリスイギリススセックスアングメリング
ja.Angmering, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスアングメリング
ja.Angmering, Sussex, , England: イギリスイギリススセックスアングメリング
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Palmerが1423年にイギリスイギリススセックスアングメリングで生まれた時，父Sir John Palmer Iは26歳，母Lady Joan Julianは23歳であった。1454年にイギリスイギリススセックスアングメリングでIsabell Elizabeth Biltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1481年にイギリススセックスで58歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Palmer(이)가 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 앤그머잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Palmer I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Julian(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 앤그머잉에서 Isabell Elizabeth Bilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 영국 수세스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Palmer nasceu em 1423, em Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Palmer I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Julian, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabell Elizabeth Bilton em 1454, em Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1481, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Palmer родился в 1423 г. в местности ангмиринг, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Palmer I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Julian, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabell Elizabeth Bilton в 1454 г. в местности ангмиринг, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1481 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Palmer nació en 1423, en Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Palmer I, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Julian, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Isabell Elizabeth Bilton en 1454, en Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1481, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Somerset, Inglaterra.
